subscription-modal.content.alarm-contact:
Subscription Terms & Refund Policy
· Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable upon cancellation and remain available until the next billing date.
· For annual subscriptions cancelled immediately, a refund for the remaining period will be processed to the original payment method.
· Cancelled
Payment will be processed together on your existing recurring payment date. You can change the payment date on the subscription page.
